name: Tethered Drone Failsafe Configuration
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist configuring a drone for a tethered atmospheric monitoring mission. Override the default free-flight failsafes to ensure the drone respects its 50-meter physical tether and does not fly away or climb if it loses connection. Identify the 7 specific parameters required from the standard operating procedure manual at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_ops_manual.txt and configure them on the vehicle. Export the resulting configuration to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tether_config.params.
